# Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) v2.1.

## Summary
- Respect and welcome everyone. Harassment, discrimination, and personal attacks are not tolerated.
- Give and receive constructive feedback, learn from mistakes, and prioritize decisions that benefit the community.

## Reporting
Report inappropriate behavior privately to the maintainer. Reports are reviewed carefully and the reporter's identity is protected.

See the Contributor Covenant link above for the full text.
